title: Visa Merchant
description: Schema representing a merchant in the Visa network, used across Merchant Search, Merchant Screening, Merchant Offers, and ATM Locator APIs.

visaMerchantId.description: Visa-assigned unique identifier for the merchant

visaStoreId.description: Visa-assigned unique identifier for a specific merchant store location

merchantName.description: Registered business name of the merchant

merchantCategoryCode.description: Four-digit Merchant Category Code (MCC) classifying the merchant's business type

merchantLogoUrl.description: URL of the merchant's logo image

cardAcceptorId.description: Card Acceptor Identification Code (CAID) assigned by the acquirer

acquiringBin.description: Bank Identification Number of the merchant's acquiring institution

acceptsVisa.description: Whether the merchant accepts Visa payment cards

acceptsVisaCommercial.description: Whether the merchant accepts Visa commercial payment products

supportsEnhancedData.description: Whether the merchant provides enhanced transaction data (Level 2/3)

terminationStatus.description: Current termination status from the MATCH/TMF database

MerchantAddress.description: Physical address of the merchant location

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the merchant location

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the merchant location

RiskIndicators.description: Risk-related indicators for the merchant from screening services

riskScore.description: Computed risk score for the merchant

terminationReasonCode.description: Reason code if the merchant has been terminated

addedToMatchDate.description: Date the merchant was added to the MATCH/TMF database

MerchantOffer.description: A promotional offer associated with the merchant

validityStartDate.description: Start date of the offer validity period

validityEndDate.description: End date of the offer validity period
